text.title: Gumroad Ops Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure to publish, run, and review a Gumroad listing.

step.name: build-cover
step.action: Design cover at ≥1600×900. Export PNG. Keep readable at 200px width (social preview).

step.name: fill-listing-fields
step.action: Fill templates/gumroad-listing.yaml: product_id, cover_url, subtitle (≤280), price.mode + amount, product_type, refund_policy, tags (1-5).
step.decision-gate: Any required field empty → block. Rule r1.

step.name: wire-license-and-affiliate
step.action: If product_type=license, enable License API and integrate `/v2/licenses/verify` in the client. Enable affiliate program; set commission_pct in [30, 50]; choose payout cadence.
step.output: License integration tested + affiliate program live.
step.decision-gate: product_type=license AND license_api_enabled=false → block. Rule r3.

step.name: ab-copy-experiment
step.action: Launch Gumroad A/B copy experiment. Hold variants for ≥14 days OR until 100 conversions per variant.

step.name: launch-and-affiliate-recruitment
step.action: Recruit 5-10 affiliates via templates/affiliate-invite.md. Track conversions per affiliate.

step.name: monthly-review
step.action: Compute conversion_rate, refund_rate, rank_30d_revenue. Promote top 2 listings to feature spots; demote bottom 2 (archive or unbundle). Update review block in the listing config.
step.output: Updated listing config + monthly review note.
